refnamediv.refpurpose: Creates a Box-Benkhen Design of Experiments.

listitem.para: a 1-by-1 matrix of doubles, positive integer, with nb_var > 2. The number of variables of the experiment.
a 1-by-1 matrix of doubles, positive integer. Default value nb_center=1. The number of repetitions of the central point in the design.
The created Box Benhken Design of Experiments.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Creates a Box Benhken design of experiments, with nb_var variables (the factors of the experiment), and a center point repeated nb_center times in the design.

refsection.title: Examples
